creator: msvincen@midway.uchicago.edu
text:
dump utility only allows filesystem dump levels 0-9.

Fix: submitted this update to gnu version a couple years ago. Please incorporate
feature into freebsd.   Patch allows dump levels up to max val of int type. 

The code is here and pasted uuencoded below.
http://www.lib.uchicago.edu/~msv/freebsddiff

best regards
Matthew
